summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Project Atlas banking platform. Backend: 15/17 tests passed (88.2%). Frontend: All features working with professional UI. One critical backend bug found in scheduled payments API.

critical_bugs.issue: 500 Internal Server Error - BSON cannot encode datetime.date objects. MongoDB expects datetime objects but schema uses date type for start_date and end_date fields.
critical_bugs.error_details: bson.errors.InvalidDocument: cannot encode object: datetime.date(2026, 1, 9), of type: <class 'datetime.date'>
critical_bugs.suggested_fix: Convert date objects to datetime before saving to MongoDB, or change schema to use datetime instead of date type

minor_issues.issue: Returns 400 'Beneficiary already exists' when trying to add duplicate
minor_issues.impact: Expected behavior but test should handle gracefully

design_observations.observation: Mobile tabs have class 'md:hidden' which correctly hides them on desktop. Working as intended.

passed_tests: P2P transfer to admin (UUID fix working)
Spending insights with pie chart (€1000 total, 5 categories)
Professional UI with white background and red accents
All stat tiles (Accounts, Cards, Transfers, Statements)

critical: Fix scheduled payments API: Convert datetime.date to datetime before MongoDB insertion in /app/backend/services/advanced_service.py or update schema in /app/backend/schemas/advanced.py to use datetime instead of date type
verification: After fix, verify scheduled payment creation works by running: python /app/backend/backend_test.py
notes: UUID fix for ScheduledPayment and Beneficiary schemas is working correctly
Admin account with bank account is working - P2P transfer to admin successful
Professional UI confirmed - solid white background with red accents, no gradients
Mobile bottom tabs working correctly (hidden on desktop with md:hidden class)
